name: Date-Topped Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. Add sugar to the dry ingredients and mix well.
3. Beat the egg and melt the butter in a separate container.
4. Gradually add the egg mixture and melted butter to the flour mixture.
5. Stir in the chopped nuts.
6. In another bowl, combine 1 cup of dates (chopped), 1 tsp soda dissolved in boiling water, remaining 1/3 tsp salt, and 1 cup of pitted dates (chopped).
7. Pour the date mixture over the cake batter and stir to combine.
8. Grease an 80-inch baking pan and pour the batter into it.
9. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 55 minutes.
10. Remove from the oven and let cool in the pan.
11. Serve warm or cold, topped with whipped cream if desired. Makes 9 servings.
